---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com

---

I am an Associate Professor of Artificial Intelligence, with a special interest in Smart Cities, Large Language Models and Qualitative Analysis. I have always found it a bit tricky to keep a schedule and stick to habits. I have always enjoyed learning new things, but I have always struggled with taking notes.

I have been following productivity trends for a while and have always wanted to incorporate them into my personal and professional life, but it has not quite worked out. Recently, I have started to understand that it is because of different reasons.

For example, the difficulty of taking notes, processing them and managing them. This is something I have always found hard to get into.

Recently, I have started dictating everything I write. This has been incredibly helpful, as it has reduced the friction involved in typing and writing. This blog is, in some ways, a result of that. It will document my experiments with writing more frequently and more publicly, in an attempt to document my learning process.
